Focus Mode

Tell us about yourself

We'll personalize your experience and set your daily productivity goal.

How should we handle distracting sites?

Choose your default warning behavior when you open an unproductive site.

⏳
Countdown
5-second pause before access
⚠️
Warn Only
Ask before entering, no delay
🔒
Hard Block
Requires Focus Mode override

Customize your site lists

We've added defaults — remove any you don't want or add your own.

🚫 Unproductive
